faqs.question: What does a preventative plumbing inspection include?
faqs.answer: Our plumbing inspections cover all fixtures, supply lines, drain systems, water heater condition, water pressure, and visible pipe integrity. We identify potential issues before they become emergencies.

faqs.question: How often should I have my water heater flushed?
faqs.answer: We recommend water heater flushing at least once a year to remove sediment buildup, improve efficiency, and extend the life of your unit.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule preventative maintenance?
faqs.answer: We recommend annual plumbing inspections for most homes. Older homes or properties with known issues may benefit from semi-annual visits. Our Maintenance Plans make scheduling easy.

faqs.question: Can preventative maintenance really save me money?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Catching small issues early — like minor leaks, corroding pipes, or sediment buildup — prevents costly emergency repairs and water damage down the road.
